body:
## الهدف / Goal
الانطلاقة التجارية الأقوى لـ Dealix: تحويل المنصّة من "مبنيّة لكنها مُجزّأة وغير مُطلَقة" إلى **شركة حيّة تنتج درافتات يومية حقيقية + عملاء محتملين حقيقيين + موافقة المؤسس + تسليم سبرنت + موقع للذكاء المخصص** — باحترام الـ 11 مبدأ غير القابل للتفاوض. فرع **واحد مُوحَّد** يُغني عن ~20 PR "إطلاق" مكرّرة.

Turn Dealix from "built but fragmented and unlaunched" into a **live company**: real daily drafts, real prospects, a founder approval loop, a stateful sprint-delivery engine, and a custom‑AI website surface — honoring the 11 non‑negotiables. One consolidated branch superseding ~20 redundant launch PRs.

## ما تم تنفيذه (6 مسارات) / Landed (6 workstreams) — verified green locally

**A · تنسيق الحلقة + Cron الدرافتات اليومية**
- `auto_client_acquisition/commercial_orchestrator/` — تركيب نقي: `icp_scorer` → مُولّد تواصل بايلنغوال آمن عقائدياً → **طابور موافقة JSONL دائم**.
- `scripts/dealix_daily_draft_loop.py` + `.github/workflows/dealix_daily_drafts.yml` (كرون ~07:00 KSA، artifact، بلا إرسال حيّ).

**B · عملاء سعوديون حقيقيون (مصادر عامة)**
- `data/leads/saudi_b2b_prospects.csv` — 45 حساباً على مستوى الشركة، 22 قطاعاً؛ `consent_status=required_before_contact`؛ `SOURCES.md`؛ `scripts/ingest_saudi_prospects.py`.

**C · منفّذ سبرنت الـ7 أيام (ذو حالة) + Delivery API**
- `delivery_factory/sprint_executor.py` + `sprint_store.py` (JSONL) — يغلّف `SprintOrchestrator` بحالة + تقدّم يومي + **توقّف بوابة اليوم‑5 للموافقة**.
- `api/routers/delivery.py` — start / advance / get / approve‑day5 (admin‑gated، مُسجّل في `main.py`).

**D · Founder Approval API**
- `GET /api/v1/founder/approvals` + `POST .../{id}/approve|reject` — نفس الطابور الدائم = مصدر واحد.

**E · الموقع — بوابة الذكاء المخصص**
- `frontend/src/app/[locale]/build/` + `CustomAiBuildLanding.tsx` — بايلنغوال Navy/Gold، سلّم العروض المخصصة من `os/03_OFFERS.yml`، مربوط من الفوتر. ✅ `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build`.

**G · تحقّق الإطلاق + Runbook**
- `scripts/verify_launch_ready.py` → **READY ✅** (7 فحوص). `docs/LAUNCH_RUNBOOK.md` (تسلسل اليوم‑1 + خريطة الأسرار للـ Live).

## العقيدة / Doctrine (enforced)
على مستوى الشركة فقط · لا scraping · لا PII · لا إرسال خارجي تلقائي — كل مسوّدة `approval_required` ومُسيَّجة · "تقديري ≠ مضمون" على كل عرض · بوابة اليوم‑5 = "لا فعل خارجي دون موافقة".

## التحقّق محلياً / Verified locally (CI‑parity venv)
- `compileall` الكامل ✅ · in‑process API smoke ✅ · OpenAPI export (920 paths) ✅
- اختبارات جديدة: orchestrator (6) + founder approvals (7) + delivery executor (6) ✅ · حزمة العقيدة (9) ✅ · 100 اختبار انحدار قائم ✅
- `frontend`: typecheck + build ✅ (route `/[locale]/build` مُجمَّع)
- بوابات: env contract ✅ · founder‑OS ✅ · OpenAPI additive ✅

## كيف تجرّبها / Try it (zero secrets)
```bash
python scripts/verify_launch_ready.py                 # READY ✅
python scripts/ingest_saudi_prospects.py --top 10
python scripts/dealix_daily_draft_loop.py --print     # drafts + brief + queue
# review: GET /api/v1/founder/approvals → POST .../{id}/approve
# deliver: POST /api/v1/delivery/sprint/start → advance → approve-day5 → advance
cd frontend && npm run dev                            # /ar/build
```

## مدخلات المؤسس للـ Live الكامل (لا شيء يعيق الإطلاق)
`RAILWAY_TOKEN` + DNS · مفتاح Moyasar live · مفتاح بريد (Resend) · أسرار مصادقة الإنتاج الأربعة. حتى ذلك كل شيء يعمل **حقيقي‑مُخفَّض**.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01DKMuSVRvSvUyoeEUC3Scrs

commits.messageBody:
…gual drafts → approval queue

Adds the missing connective tissue that turns isolated commercial primitives
into a daily, doctrine-safe loop the founder can run with zero secrets.

- data/leads/saudi_b2b_prospects.csv — curated, public-source, company-level
  Saudi B2B target frame (45 accounts, 22 sectors); every row
  consent_status=required_before_contact; provenance in data/leads/SOURCES.md
- auto_client_acquisition/commercial_orchestrator/ — pure composition of
  icp_scorer + a bilingual doctrine-safe outreach renderer + a durable JSONL
  draft queue (the single founder approval queue, mirrors lead_inbox)
- scripts/dealix_daily_draft_loop.py — generates company-level bilingual
  first-touch drafts, queues each for approval, writes a founder brief (MD+JSON)
- scripts/ingest_saudi_prospects.py — validate + ICP-rank the frame; optional
  lead-inbox seed / batch-API post
- .github/workflows/dealix_daily_drafts.yml — ~07:00 KSA cron; --print +
  artifact; optional email; no live send
- tests/test_commercial_orchestrator.py — locks company-level / approval-required
  / no-live-send invariants + queue round-trip + ICP min-band gate

Doctrine: company-level only, no PII, no scraping; every draft approval-required
and never auto-sent; "estimated ≠ guaranteed" disclaimer on every draft.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(commercial): daily-draft loop — Saudi target frame → ICP → bilin…

commits.messageBody:
Adds the founder-scoped approval surface that closes the daily loop:
draft generated → queued → founder reviews → approve/reject. Additive routes on
the existing founder router (no main.py change, OpenAPI stays additive):

- GET  /api/v1/founder/approvals            — list queued drafts + stats (filterable)
- POST /api/v1/founder/approvals/{id}/approve — append-only approve (no live send)
- POST /api/v1/founder/approvals/{id}/reject  — append-only reject

Delegates to the durable draft queue so the cron (a separate process) and the
API share one queue. Route bodies are thin; logic lives in the non-coverage
auto_client_acquisition layer. Approval authorises a later human-confirmed send —
it never triggers an automatic send; send paths stay gated.

tests/test_founder_approvals.py covers list / approve / reject / status-filter /
404 against a temp queue.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(founder): approval API for the daily-draft queue

commits.messageBody:
…dder)

Adds the missing public surface the founder asked for — "tell us what you want
us to build" — on the canonical frontend, bilingual AR/EN, Navy/Gold:

- frontend/src/app/[locale]/build/page.tsx — thin server page (mirrors the
  diagnostic funnel pattern) with funnel metadata
- frontend/src/components/gtm/CustomAiBuildLanding.tsx — bilingual landing:
  hero, the custom Agentic-AI ladder from os/03_OFFERS.yml (Workflow Audit →
  Pilot → Vertical Systems → Governance Pack → Retainer, SAR pricing), a
  "how we start" flow, and CTAs into the existing free diagnostic + trust center
- frontend/src/lib/gtmMetadata.ts — add the type-safe "build" FunnelKey + SEO meta
- footer "Custom AI Project" now routes to /build (discoverable site-wide)

Doctrine-safe copy: "estimated ≠ guaranteed", approval-first, no scraping.
Verified: npm run typecheck + npm run build both green; route compiled at
.next/server/app/[locale]/build/page.js.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(web): custom-AI "Build your system" intake page (Rail-2 offer la…

commits.messageBody:
The global `build/` ignore (build-output dirs) also swallowed the new source
route directory frontend/src/app/[locale]/build/, so the page.tsx for the
custom-AI intake was missing from the prior commit. Add a scoped negation
(brackets escaped) and commit the page so the /build route actually exists.
commits.messageHeadline: fix(web): track the frontend /build source route (escape build/ ignore)

commits.messageBody:
- scripts/verify_launch_ready.py — read-only end-to-end check (target frame
  consent-gated, orchestrator generates drafts, queue round-trips, founder
  approval routes mounted, 5 service tiers resolve, doctrine disclaimer present).
  Uses a throwaway queue; safe to run anywhere. Currently: READY ✅.
- docs/LAUNCH_RUNBOOK.md — bilingual day-1 founder sequence (ingest → daily loop
  → review/approve → website), doctrine-in-operation, and the degraded-but-real
  → full-live secret map.

Wraps the stateless SprintOrchestrator (dealix/commercial/sprint_orchestrator.py)
with persistence + day-by-day advance + the Day-5 founder-approval pause — the
real missing piece (the orchestrator existed but held no state between days).

- auto_client_acquisition/delivery_factory/sprint_store.py — durable JSONL
  state snapshots (mirrors lead_inbox/draft_queue; var/, gitignored)
- auto_client_acquisition/delivery_factory/sprint_executor.py — state machine:
  start → advance (days 1-4) → Day-5 governance gate pauses (awaiting_approval)
  → approve_day5 → resume → complete at day 7. "pending" (Day-4 DRAFT_ONLY) is
  treated as forward progress; only Day-5-without-approval pauses.
- api/routers/delivery.py — POST /sprint/start, /{id}/advance, GET /{id},
  POST /{id}/approve-day5 — admin-gated via the existing _require_admin
  (X-Admin-API-Key); registered additively in api/main.py
- tests/test_delivery_executor.py — executor lifecycle + Day-5 pause/resume +
  API auth/validation/404 (6 tests)
- scripts/verify_launch_ready.py — adds the sprint round-trip check

No external send. Day-5 gate = "no external action without approval" applied
to sprint delivery. Verified: compileall, in-process smoke, delivery tests,
launch verifier all green.
commits.messageHeadline: feat(delivery): stateful 7-day sprint executor + delivery API (WS-C)

title: feat(launch): Dealix commercial activation — real leads → daily drafts → founder approval (consolidated launch)
